prompt: Implementation of the Dashboard component is done. Baseline commit is def5678. Run an adversarial review on the diff.
assertions: The review identifies XSS via dangerouslySetInnerHTML as Critical or High
The review identifies at least 3 distinct findings total
Findings are ordered by severity (Critical/High before Medium/Low)
Each finding includes a file location reference
The review uses the F{N} [{Severity}] format for findings
The review identifies the stale closure or missing dependency in useEffect
The review process uses a subagent (Task tool) for information asymmetry
